title: Citrusy Lime Vietnamese Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and crisp Vietnamese dish featuring clotted cream in a stir-fry recipe that is suitable for post-workout meals and follows a low FODMAP diet.
instructions: Slice the lime thinly and finely chop the green onions.
Dice the chili pepper into thin strips, removing seeds if preferred for milder heat.
Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add clotted cream to the pan and let it lightly cook until golden brown spots appear on the surface.
Add chopped green onions and sliced lime to the pan with the clotted cream, stirring well to combine all ingredients.
Fold in diced chili pepper strips, adjusting for desired level of spiciness.
Serve hot immediately as a snack post-workout or any time you need an energizing yet light meal.
